# Switzerland Crypto License

> Switzerland Crypto License is a specialist consultancy for Swiss crypto licensing — VQF SRO membership, FINMA Fintech license, and Swiss DLT framework. Powered by X24Consulting OÜ — 8 years of EU crypto licensing experience.

## Company

- **Brand:** Switzerland Crypto License
- **Parent:** Consulting24 (https://consulting24.co/)
- **Legal entity:** X24Consulting OÜ (private limited company)
- **Estonian Business Register code:** 16971898
- **Registered address:** Poordi tn 3-63, Kesklinna linnaosa, 10156 Tallinn, Harju maakond, Estonia
- **Founder & CEO:** Mardo Soo — https://www.linkedin.com/in/mardo-s-00a05ab0/
- **Phone:** +372 58155779
- **Email:** mardo@consulting24.co

## Jurisdiction overview

- **Jurisdiction:** Switzerland
- **Regulator:** FINMA (Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority)
- **License/registration type:** Switzerland SRO membership (VQF) or FINMA Fintech License or Banking License — depending on activity

## Key facts

- **Total setup cost (SRO):** $30,000–$80,000 USD
- **Total setup cost (FINMA Fintech):** $150,000–$350,000 USD
- **Min. paid-up capital (FINMA Fintech):** CHF 300,000
- **Timeline (SRO):** 2–4 months
- **Timeline (FINMA Fintech):** 6–12 months
- **Tax (federal + canton + municipality):** 11–14% effective

## When this jurisdiction is the right fit

- Premium institutional brands valuing Swiss banking credibility
- Crypto exchanges or custodians targeting Crypto Valley network
- Operators seeking FINMA-supervised entity for institutional onboarding
- Swiss-domiciled founders or teams already in Zug / Zurich / Geneva

## When this jurisdiction is NOT the right fit

- Bootstrapped startups (Switzerland is mid-tier on cost)
- EU-passport-only targets (Lithuania CASP cheaper for the same outcome)
- Speed-to-market plays (Canada MSB or El Salvador faster)
- Pure offshore tax plays (Switzerland is fully transparent)

## Comparable jurisdictions

- **Lithuania CASP (MiCA):** $50K–$120K setup, 4–8 months, €125K capital, EU passport. https://mardo89.github.io/lithuania-vasp-license/
- **Canada MSB (FINTRAC):** $8K–$25K setup, 3–6 weeks, $0 capital, North American fiat rails. https://mardo89.github.io/canada-msb-license/
- **Panama crypto:** $15K–$45K setup, 6–12 weeks, $0 capital, territorial tax. https://mardo89.github.io/panama-crypto-license/

## Source disclosures

Information here reflects May 2026 conditions and is general guidance, not legal advice. Regulations change — confirm with qualified counsel before acting.
